# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices

---

apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service1
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service1
        image: service1-image

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service2
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service2
        image: service2-image

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service1-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service1
  port: 80

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: service1-to-service2
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  subject:
    kind: Service
    name: service1
  destination:
    kind: Service
    name: service2
    port: 80
